title: 勇戦ネバーギブアップ

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
One day, while passing by an arcade, I spot
Vodka playing a fighting game.

text_block_list.name: Arcade Machine
text_block_list.text: Ba-ba-bam! Whooosh! K.O.! Player one wins!

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text: Aw yeah! That's another victory for me!

text_block_list.name: Elementary School Boy
text_block_list.text: Tch...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Her opponent, a young grade-schooler, bites his
lip in clear frustration at his loss.

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text:
Guess you'll be giving up after how many times I
wiped the floor with you, huh?

text_block_list.name: Arcade Machine
text_block_list.text: A new challenger has appeared!

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text: Wow... Ya got pluck, kid.

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text:
I like your style. Time to show you what coolness
really looks like!

text_block_list.name: Arcade Machine
text_block_list.text: Pow! Crack! Pa-pow! K.O.! Player two wins!

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text:
Whoa, look at that—I lost! I got totally whooped
by that unyielding spirit of yours!

text_block_list.name: Elementary School Boy
text_block_list.text: Wait... Did you lose on purpose?

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text:
Huh? Well, not exactly... It's more like I was
moved by your gutsiness, so...

text_block_list.name: Elementary School Boy
text_block_list.text: Nngh! Don't make fun of me!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Stomp, stomp, stomp!

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text: Whoa, hey! Where are you going?!

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text: But I wasn't even making fun of him...

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text: Dammit! What's wrong with me?

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text: No matter how badly I lose a race, I never want anyone to just roll over and let me win.

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text:
The only way to get rid of the pain of losing is to
do your best against your opponent until you win
fair and square!

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text:
Victory doesn't mean anything unless you win
with your own strength!

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text: There you are! I've been looking for you!

text_block_list.name: Elementary School Boy
text_block_list.text: Huh? What are you doing here?

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text: Listen, I'm sorry about earlier. I mean it!

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text:
You wanted to win properly, and I went and
trampled on your ambitions!

text_block_list.name: Elementary School Boy
text_block_list.text:
It's fine. Anyway, I'm sorry... for challenging you
over and over...

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text:
Psh, what are you talking about?! It was awesome
how you kept stepping up to the plate and taking
me on!

text_block_list.name: Elementary School Boy
text_block_list.text: R-really?!

text_block_list.name: Elementary School Boy
text_block_list.text:
Okay then, I want to fight you again! And this
time, you're going down!

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text:
Bring it on! You'd better prepared to get washed,
though!

text_block_list.name: Elementary School Boy
text_block_list.text: You're the one who should be prepared!

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text: Hah! That's the spirit!
